title: Bureau Truth Model v2
goal: Separate durable Git truth, operational evidence and the derived repository frontier so Bureau remains correct, available and low-friction without acquiring hidden execution authority.
completion: Live Register current-state projections are complete regardless of displayed history limits and expose explicit coverage metadata.
A narrow independent read-only status capsule reports bounded Bureau truth with freshness and unavailable semantics.
Registry and implementation drift is detected and can be closed only through reviewed evidence-bound plans.
Lifecycle-ledger shadow mode demonstrates parity before any reduction of Git lifecycle updates.
Repository frontier is the primary work view and exposes one active write ball per repository plus parallel conflict-free repositories.
Long-lived backlog and stale Live Register candidates have explicit revalidation outcomes.

does_not_establish: replacement of GitHub or Grabowski truth
